headlines.headline: Jovor Networks reports record quarterly revenue, up 3% year-over-year

sentiment.reasoning: A 3% year-over-year revenue increase is a modest growth signal that confirms stable operations but lacks significant momentum.

headlines.headline: Yorven Labs explores strategic alternatives for cloud infrastructure unit

sentiment.reasoning: Exploring strategic alternatives often signals a potential divestiture or sale, creating significant uncertainty regarding the future structure of the business unit.

headlines.headline: Arnos Marketplace wins industry award for excellence in supply chain optimization

sentiment.reasoning: Industry awards provide positive brand validation but rarely translate into immediate or material financial performance shifts.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
